title: Banksy Satire Continuity
description: A four-image continuity series that establishes a reference composition for Banksy Street Satire and then tests how far the same visual DNA can stretch without losing identity.
creative_direction: Image 01 establishes the baseline composition and symbolic grammar for Banksy Street Satire; images 02-04 preserve that same camera logic and dominant motif while changing material, narrative density, and atmosphere.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Banksy Satire Continuity
en.description: A four-image continuity series that establishes a reference composition for Banksy Street Satire and then tests how far the same visual DNA can stretch without losing identity.

zh-CN.title: 街头讽刺 连续变体
zh-CN.description: 四张连续系列图，先为 Banksy 街头讽刺 · stencil 涂鸦 建立基准画面，再测试同一视觉 DNA 在不同条件下的延展能力。
